SEARCH
Package grafioschtrader.entities

Class AlgoSimulationResult

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.entities.BaseID<Integer>
grafiosch.entities.TenantBaseID
grafioschtrader.entities.AlgoSimulationResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
@Entity public class AlgoSimulationResult extends TenantBaseID implements Serializable
Stores aggregated performance metrics from a simulation run. Includes return, drawdown, Sharpe ratio, and trade statistics.
See Also:
